title: When an item is moved from one board to a specific group in another board then automatically create a subitem

posts.author: Ozi (Oz Israel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com team,
Please set up an automation which allows to automatically create a subitem when an item is moved from one board to a specific group in another board.
You can see Simen question about this topic here: Issue with automatically creating subitems?
Thank You,
Oz

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ozi:

specific group in another board

Hey @Ozi ,

Our Mirror Item Multiple Boards app can help you with this.

We have automations like When item is moved to Group, create an item in Target Board Target Group.

These items are also linked, so any changes on a column are updated on the counterpart as well.

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co for a quick discussion on this.
